## Type of change / Tipo de cambio

- [ ] 🐛 Bugfix
- [ ] ✨ Feature / Funcionalidad (backward-compatible / retrocompatible)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes / pasa
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes / pasa
- [ ] `npm run test` passes / pasa
- [ ] `npm run build` passes / pasa
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npm run changeset`) if it affects the published package / si afecta a lo publicado
- [ ] Updated the docs if needed / Actualicé la documentación si era necesario
